task_completion.description: Verify the Render Engine is set to Cycles.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In Blender's Properties editor, under the Render Properties tab (camera icon), the 'Render Engine' dropdown should display 'Cycles'.

task_completion.description: Verify the render resolution is set to 2048x1024 pixels.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In Blender's Properties editor, under the Output Properties tab (printer icon), the Format Resolution X should be '2048 px' and Y should be '1024 px'.

task_completion.description: Verify the active camera is positioned at X: -5.0m, Y: 0.0m, Z: 1.5m.
task_completion.visual_evidence: With the camera selected, in the Object Properties tab (orange square icon) or the 3D Viewport sidebar (N-panel), the Transform Location values must show X: -5 m, Y: 0 m, Z: 1.5 m.

task_completion.description: Verify the camera is configured as Panoramic with Equirectangular projection.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Object Data Properties tab (green camera icon), the Lens 'Type' must be set to 'Panoramic' and the 'Panorama Type' dropdown must be set to 'Equirectangular'.

task_completion.description: Verify the final image is rendered and saved as classroom_360.png in the correct directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager, terminal (e.g., ls command), or Blender's Image Editor save dialog shows 'classroom_360.png' saved in '/home/ga/BlenderProjects/'. The image itself should be visible in a render window or image viewer.

task_completion.description: Verify the modified project is saved as classroom_vr_setup.blend in the correct directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Blender application window title bar shows 'classroom_vr_setup.blend', or a file manager/terminal shows this file exists in '/home/ga/BlenderProjects/'.

integrity.description: Verify Blender was actually used to configure the scene.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the actual Blender GUI with the classroom scene loaded and manipulated, rather than just a text editor or terminal spoofing the outputs.

integrity.description: Verify the rendered image is a genuine 360-degree render.
integrity.visual_evidence: The rendered image 'classroom_360.png' (if visible in the render window or an image viewer) should show the classroom scene with equirectangular distortion (curved lines, stretched top/bottom), indicating a real panoramic render.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not just create empty files or text files with the expected names.
integrity.visual_evidence: File sizes in the file manager or terminal should be appropriate (the .blend file should be large, ~70MB, and the .png should be a valid image file size). The files should not be shown opened in a basic text editor.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target render engine is CYCLES. The target resolution is 2048x1024 (2:1 aspect ratio). The target camera type is PANO (Panoramic) and the panorama type is EQUIRECTANGULAR. The camera must be located at X: -5.0, Y: 0.0, Z: 1.5. The expected output files are '/home/ga/BlenderProjects/classroom_vr_setup.blend' and '/home/ga/BlenderProjects/classroom_360.png'.
